Title: 17 (Side Quests)
SubTitle: Most of the level 17 side quests feature mobs that you can farm ahead of time. Alternatively, if you'd prefer to skip the hunting, many of the necessary drop items are available for purchase at the auction.
Fayspire:
**Quest Name:** Fayspires Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Adrwyiel Niteshyre  
**Location:** Fayspires  

---

**1.** Talk to **Adrwyiel Niteshyre** in the Wizard Guild — the east building jutting out into the lake. She sends you to kill **Tesarin Moonstrider (CONs Wht)** in the **Sslathis** zone. To find Tesarin Moonstrider, from **Freeport** swim south down the coast. It's a long swim!  
Swim past several (6) zones, including **Hazinak**. Once you pass Hazinak, look for the environmental boundary line (between the desert and the swamps — you will see mountains, too). Follow the boundary line east to the **Sslathis** zone central, turn south, and look for a **black pyramid**, which will be hard to see at night. Tesarin is on top of the black pyramid.  

💡 *Hint:* Ask a wizard to port you to **Sslathis** — the quest mob is standing on the port itself.  
Tesarin is a **Necromancer** and has a **pet (CONs grn)**. Kill, loot, and return to Adrwyiel.  

**2.** Adrwyiel sends you to **Vaelan Wyndsorrow**, located in the **Enchanters Guild** (the west building jutting out into the lake). He wants **600 tunar**. Return to Adrwyiel afterward.  

**3.** Adrwyiel sends you to **Lutherian Doomsinger** for your reward. He is across the room from Adrwyiel.  

---

**Rewards:**  
- **Bards:** Bracers  
- **Clerics:** Bracers  
- **Druids:** Bracers of the Gladestrider  
- **Enchanters:** Bracers of Brilliance  
- **Paladins:** Bracers  
- **Rangers:** Bracers of Nature's Ward  
- **Rogues:** Amulet of the Silent Strider  
- **Wizards:** Robe of Insight  

---

**Note:** Eastern Human Shadow Knights may not be able to receive this quest.
Freeport:
### **Quest Name:** Freeport Level 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All, Good/Evil  
**NPC:** Scribe Cathassa  
**Location:** Freeport  

---

1. Talk to **Scribe Cathassa**. She is in Freeport (FP). From the coach, enter FP through the south gate, enter the long hall, run north, and enter the second west passageway. She is in the building and needs two items:  
- **Embalming Fluid**  
- **Cured Drakes Blood**  

2. **Embalming Fluid:** Kill an **Ancient Mummy** (CONs blue to yel), which can be found in Northern Ro and Northwestern Ro zones (SW of FP). From FP coach, run SW into the desert. You can always find one near the FP human camp located in Northwestern Ro (SE); head towards the hills north of this camp. You may need to kill a few mummies to get the drop you need! Kill, loot, and now go to **Highpass (HP)**.  

3. **Cured Drakes Blood:** Buy from **Talya Montar** for 600 tunar. Talya can be found in Highpass, on the second floor of the keep, behind the stairs.  
*NOTE:* To find HP; go out the north gate of Freeport and follow the Trade Road west to HP. Better yet, ask a lvl 51+ mage to coh you or a 47+ wiz to port you.  

4. Return to **Scribe Cathassa**. To collect your reward, go to **Draeg Kuthra**. From Scribe Cathassa, go out the east door, turn south, and enter the first door to the east.  

---

**Rewards by Class:**  
- **Bards:** Gloves  
- **Clerics:** Gloves of Radiance  
- **Druids:** Gloves of the Gladestrider  
- **Enchanters:** Bracers of Brilliance  
- **Monks:** Gloves of the Disciple  
- **Necromancers:** Bracers of Shadow  
- **Paladins:** Gloves of Virtue  
- **Rangers:** Gloves of Nature's Ward  
- **Rogues:** Sash of the Silent Strider  
- **Shadowknights:** Bracers of Malice  
- **Shaman:** Spiritrune Gloves  
- **Warriors:** Soldier's Gloves  
- **Wizards:** Pendant of Insight
Grobb:
### **Quest Name:** Grobb Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Nungzsh  
**Location:** Grobb  

---

Grobb; Level 17 Quest giver; **Nungzsh** - Evil only by Singz  

1. Talk to **Nungzsh**. He is by the well in the blacksmith area of Grobb (the archway near the Froglock prisoners). He needs the **liver of a Froglok Questor** (CONs Yel). To find the questor, travel north along the road from Grobb until you find a troll war camp. Froglok Questor spawns in the marshy areas around this camp, mostly NW and SE of the troll camp. Kill, loot, and return to Grobb.  

2. Buy **sauce** from **Thuldreksh**. He is in a tent in the **Shaman's Guild**, which is through the door in the huge tree. The sauce costs **600 tunar**. Return these two items back to **Nungzsh**.  

3. **Nungzsh** sends you to **Argash** to get your reward. Argash is directly behind the well to the right of Nungzsh.  

---

**Rewards by Class:**  
- **Clerics:** Helm of Radiance  
- **Necromancers:** Gloves of Shadow  
- **Rogues:** Boots of the Silent Strider  
- **Shadowknights:** Gloves of Malice  
- **Shaman:** Spiritrune Belt  

*NOTE:* The only confirmed Erudite class that can complete this quest is the **Necromancer**. Gnome Rogues can complete this if they are very watchful for KoS trolls.
Halas:
### **Quest Name:** Halas Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All Good  
**NPC:** Olga  
**Location:** Halas  

---

1. Talk to **Olga**, who is inside the fort in one of the last huts along the river before you go out to the bank. She sends you to kill **Bloodmaw** (CONs blue), a werewolf, and deliver a letter to **Novak Mcgregor**. To find Bloodmaw, from Moradhim coach, head north along the mountain chain to Goldfeather Eyrie. Search hilly areas NW by the ramps. Kill, loot a fang, then go to **Diren's Hold**.  

2. Give **Olga's Letter** to **Novak Mcgregor** at Diren's Hold, and buy the **cleansing solution** from him for 600 tunar. Directions: from Halas, leave through the tunnel, run east along the river; on the east side is Diren's Hold. From Moradhim, run north along the mountains to a small river, follow it west to Diren's Hold.  

3. **Undin Kalenn** has your reward. From Olga, run along the row of buildings on the east side of town.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Bards: Boots  
- Clerics: Belt of Radiance  
- Druids: Boots of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Gloves of Brilliance  
- Paladins: Boots of Virtue  
- Rangers: Helm of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Dagger of the Silent Strider  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Boots  
- Warriors: Soldiers Greaves  
- Wizards: Gloves of Insight  

*NOTE:* Only dark elves that can complete this quest are Enchanters. Eastern Human Shadowknights may not be able to receive it.
Highbourne:
### **Quest Name:** Highbourne Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Indoran Veshiue  
**Location:** Highbourne  

---

1. Talk to **Indoren Veshine** in Highbourne. She sends you to kill **Ulira Veshine** (CONs blue). Directions: from coach, southern-west door, head south through the south door, across the bridge, into the building, upstairs. Alternate: coach to DM, road south, west past monolith, cut west across countryside to cliff, south-southwest past broken walls to Ulira. Kill, loot, return.  

2. Buy **cleansing solution** from **Lwudras Belladuos** just outside the church entrance for 600 tunar. Return to Indoren.  

3. Talk to **Veldruin Foamstalker** for your reward.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Clerics: Boots of Radiance  
- Druids: Leggings of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Pendant of Brilliance  
- Paladins: Helm of Virtue  
- Rangers: Boots of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Leggings of the Silent Strider  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Helm  
- Warriors: Soldier's Tunic  

*NOTE:* Only dark elves that can complete without faction are Enchanters. Others must gain faction.
Klick A'non:
### **Quest Name:** Level 17 Klick Side Quest  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All Good/Evil  
**NPC:** Ludvick Urdogeen  
**Location:** Klick A'non  

---

1. Talk to **Ludvick** (Enchanter Guild). He sends you to kill **Deidre IV** (CONs yel). Directions: from Klick coach east gate, southeast towards mountains, cross mountain shoulder to Clock Work Village. Deidre IV spawns near village flats or hill south. Kill, loot, return.  

2. Buy **Intense Grease** from **Weedle Zintink** at the Inn near white main entrance for 600 tunar. Return to Ludvick.  

3. Talk to Ludvick's brother **Vuldrek** in the Rogues Guild for your reward.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Bards: Breast Plate  
- Clerics: Greaves of Radiance  
- Druids: Tunic of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Ring of Brilliance  
- Necromancers: Robe of the Shadow  
- Paladins: Greaves  
- Rangers: Greaves of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Tunic of the Silent Strider  
- Shadowknights: Helm of Malice  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Greaves  
- Warriors: Soldier's Boots  
- Wizards: Leggings of Insight
Moradhim:
### **Quest Name:** Moradhim Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Murian Stonebeard  
**Location:** Moradhim  

---

1. Talk to **Murian Stonebeard** on the second floor of the Tavern near the Bank. She wants two items: **Nectar from Nadrin Stoneblood** and **Erollislon Viper Poison Sac**.  

2. Poison Sac: Go to **The Druk Zone** south of Fay. From Fay coach, run south along the road to a bridge, follow river south. The **Erollislon Viper** (CONs blue to yel) roams east of the river.  

3. Nectar: **Nadrin Stoneblood** is in Moradhim, down ramps, 600 tunar.  

4. Return to Murian Stonebeard.  

5. **Mildred Blightforge** has your reward.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Bards: Necklace  
- Clerics: Tunic of Radiance  
- Druids: Belt of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Robe of Brilliance  
- Monks: Disciple's Helm  
- Necromancers: Sash of Shadows  
- Paladins: Tunic of Virtue  
- Rangers: Tunic of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Gloves of the Silent Strider  
- Shadowknights: Pendant of Malice  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Tunic  
- Warriors: Soldier's Belt  
- Wizards: Gloves of Insight  

*NOTE:* Only dark elf class that can complete is Enchanter.
Neriak - Nektulos:
### **Quest Name:** Neriak Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Tanadril N'Thael  
**Location:** Neriak  

---

1. Talk to **Tanadril N'Thael** in the Cleric's Guild. She wants a **Ceremonial Dagger** and a **Vial of Blood**.  

2. **Ceremonial Dagger:** Go to Wizard Guild Spurned Enclave in Neriak, basement room, **Adrassya N'Var** sells for 600 Tunar.  

3. **Vial of Blood:** Kill **Wandering Priestess** (CONs Red) in Blakedown, roaming spawn. Kill, loot.  

4. Return to Tanadril N'Thael for XP and faction (+100 Citizens of Neriak, +10 Indigo Brotherhood).  

5. Locate **Denouncer G'Efia** at the base of the Cleric's Guild for a class-specific item.
Qeynos:
### **Quest Name:** Qeynos Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Laressa Nevar  
**Location:** Qeynos  

---

1. Talk to **Laressa Nevar** inside the Paladin Guild. She sends you to **Drailis** in Forkwatch.  

2. Kill **Shadowhand Bandits** (CONs Blu) in Qeynos farmlands, collect receipt, travel to **Nanigar Volsweath** in Wyndhaven.  

3. Purchase blade for 600 tunar from Nanigar, return to Laressa.  

4. **Kaelron Uldaras** gives your reward.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Clerics: Ring of Radiance  
- Druids: Ring of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Slippers of Brilliance  
- Magicians: Chromatic Tome  
- Monks: Disciple's Sash  
- Necromancers: Boots of Shadow  
- Paladins: Ring of Virtue  
- Rangers: Belt of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Ring of the Silent Strider  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Ring  
- Warriors: Ring  

*NOTE:* Only dark elves that can complete are Enchanters.
Rivervale:
### **Quest Name:** Rivervale Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Syrus Gilstride  
**Location:** Rivervale  

---

1. Talk to **Syrus Gilstride** inside the Druid guild. He sends you to **RunnyEye** to kill **Tesht'uzu** (CONs Yel).  

2. Directions to RunnyEye: out HP north gate, left at second rock, north by northwest across countryside to east-west mountain chain, follow mountain west, then road north to RunnyEye. Alternate: trail northeast from last ranger station in Merry-by-Water to second camp on hill.  

3. Kill **Tesht'uzu**, loot amulet, return to Syrus.  

4. Get **Karana's Tears** vial from **Lyliann Brindlespur** in SW Rivervale, 600 tunar.  

5. Return to Syrus, then see **Ren Deeppockets** for reward.  

**Rewards by Class:**  
- Bards: Sword  
- Clerics: Shield of Radiance  
- Druids: Crook of the Gladestrider  
- Enchanters: Wand of Brilliance  
- Paladins: Ahlspiess of Virtue  
- Rangers: Sword of Nature's Ward  
- Rogues: Helm of the Silent Strider  
- Warriors: Soldier's Blade  
- Wizards: Wand of Insight  

*NOTE:* Only dark elves that can complete are Enchanters.
Highpass:
### **Quest Name:** Highpass Hold Lvl 17 Side Quest Walkthrough  
**Level:** 17  
**Class:** All/All  
**NPC:** Holthis D'Worok  
**Location:** Highpass Hold  

---

1. Talk to **Holthis D'Worok**, south gate from HP coach, near coach, follow wall. Collect 3 **Grave Silks** from **Grave Spiders** (CONs LB) in Rat/Spider Tomb in Hagley. Also pay 600 Tunar. Return to Holthis.  

**Class Rewards (Part 1):**  
- Clerics: Shield of Radiance  
- Enchanters: Robe of Brilliance  
- Necromancers: Leggings and Tunic of Shadow  
- Shadowknights: Legplates of Malice  
- Shaman: Spiritrune Spear  
- Warriors: Soldier's Greaves  
- Wizards: Robe  

2. Holthis sends you to **Durin** in Grobb.  

3. Go to Grobb, north of coach, **Informant Durin**, pay 500 tunar, kill **Courrier Svex** (CONs YEL), loot 4 scrolls. Return to Holthis.  

4. NPC next to Holthis gives reward.  

**Reward:** 263,426 XP + class-specific item.  

*NOTE:* Only Erudite classes confirmed: Necromancers and Shadowknights.
